nasb.text: Now it came about after the death of Moses the servant of the Lord, that the Lord spoke to Joshua the son of Nun, Moses’ servant, saying,

esv.text: After the death of Moses the servant of the Lord, the Lord said to Joshua the son of Nun, Moses’ assistant,

cnv.text: 耶和華的僕人摩西死了以後，耶和華吩咐摩西的侍從，嫩的兒子約書亞，說：

ccb.text: 耶和华的仆人摩西死了以后，耶和华对摩西的助手——嫩的儿子约书亚说：
